questions: Why do Meta Ads and Google Analytics numbers differ?
How should we reconcile platform vs. analytics reporting?
qa.answer: Different attribution models, lookback windows, click vs. session counting, cross‑device tracking, consent, and blocked cookies create gaps. Platform lift and modeled conversions also diverge from Analytics reads.
implication: Align windows and definitions where feasible; document differences.
Triangulate with experiments and MMM for decisions; avoid last‑click bias.
Use server‑side events and CAPI to improve match and signal quality.
